about.en: Curve is a decentralized exchange and automated market maker focused on stablecoin, pegged-asset, and liquidity pool trading across multiple blockchain networks.
about.es: Curve es un exchange descentralizado y automated market maker centrado en stablecoins, activos vinculados y trading de pools de liquidez en multiples redes blockchain.
about.ca: Curve es un exchange descentralitzat i automated market maker centrat en stablecoins, actius vinculats i trading de pools de liquiditat en multiples xarxes blockchain.
